Notice Of Motion For Stay Of This Action
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney Richard M. McNeely, Esq. of Fidelity National Law Group (925-817-3705), counsel for defendant/moving party
No appearance by plaintiff

Counsel for moving party appears and presents stipulation with details regarding the stay and a proposed order. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Stay Of This Action is GRANTED. Stipulation is filed in open court. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
